title: Client Intake Playbook
description: First touch through qualify for small business: form, email, DM, or call. Triage before quote. Not complaint recovery (see mf-tpl-001).

mindset.principle: Intake is qualify and schedule, not close on first contact.

mistakes.label: Slow first touch
mistakes.cost: Lead goes cold or posts publicly

mistakes.label: Treat anger as a new lead

steps.action: Record channel, time, source, raw ask
Short reply: received, next step, no quote yet unless ready branch
Ask missing fields or send quote path

intake_types.label: New inquiry
intake_types.signal: First contact, neutral or curious tone

intake_types.label: Complaint disguised as intake
intake_types.signal: Failure, refund, angry about past work

intake_types.label: Spam or irrelevant
intake_types.signal: SEO pitch, unrelated bulk, obvious bot

intake_types.label: Unclear
intake_types.signal: One line, no scope, emoji only

process.overview: Same five steps for email, form, DM, SMS. First touch within SLA; quote only on ready branch or after qualify.

steps.name: First touch
steps.goal: Human saw it; next step named

sla.business_hours_boost: Same day if received before 2pm local and you are open
sla.rush_note: Rush template only if you can actually deliver; otherwise defer with date

decision_branches.situation: Wants work but no specs, size, or deliverable
Deliverable, quantity, deadline, and contact clear
decision_branches.action: first-touch-standard + quote in follow-up same thread
decision_branches.notes: Log as ready_to_buy. Payment link only after human confirms tier.
Offer tier menu if you have one; do not custom price blind.

decision_branches.situation: Urgent deadline under your normal turnaround
decision_branches.notes: Rush fee or honest no. Never promise to win the race you cannot run.

decision_branches.situation: Second message before you replied to first
Past failure, refund demand, angry about delivery

decision_branches.notes: Log optional as spam to train filters.

decision_branches.situation: Outside service area, ethics, or capacity
decision_branches.notes: Refer if you can. No ghost.

qualify_fields.question: What exactly do you need delivered? (file, print, service visit)
How many / what size / which locations?
When do you need it? Hard deadline or flexible?
Ballpark budget or tier? (helps us route)
Who approves spend and final proof?

log_fields.why: new_lead / ready_to_buy / repeat / complaint_mask / spam / unclear
quote / call / wait on them / closed

weekly_review: How many quoted blind before qualify? (goal: zero)
Any complaint_mask misrouted as new lead?
One template tweak for next week?

cheat_sheet.quick_ref: Capture · Classify · First touch · Qualify · Log
